messages.content:
You are a relevance classifier for a portfolio risk app.

For each article below, determine if it's relevant to any of the given positions.

Positions:
{positions}

Articles:
{articles}

Return JSON array where each entry has:
- "article_index": 0-based index
- "relevant": true/false
- "affected_tickers": ["NVDA", "AAPL"] (if relevant)
- "event_type": "company_specific|macro|sector|theme|irrelevant"
- "why_it_matters": one sentence

Rules:
- If article mentions a held ticker by name or alias → relevant (company_specific)
- If macro/financial news matches position themes → relevant (macro/sector)
- Analyst downgrades/upgrades with price targets → minor, still relevant
- General market commentary with no specific tickers → irrelevant unless macro theme matches
- Only flag articles as relevant if there's a clear connection to held positions
- Quote pages, chart pages, generic price pages, and low-information stock recaps are irrelevant even if they mention the ticker

Positions:
- AZO: growth archetype
- CHTR: growth archetype

Articles:
[0] Title: Spectrum Promotes Dave Rodrian to Senior Vice President, Connectivity Products - Charter Communications
    Summary: Spectrum Promotes Dave Rodrian to Senior Vice President, Connectivity Products Charter Communications

[1] Title: Charter to Participate in MoffettNathanson Media, Internet & Communications Conference - PR Newswire
    Summary: Charter to Participate in MoffettNathanson Media, Internet & Communications Conference PR Newswire

[2] Title: Charter Communications shares slump on Q1 results, dragging down sector peers - MSN
    Summary: Charter Communications shares slump on Q1 results, dragging down sector peers MSN

[3] Title: AZO Technical Analysis | Trend, Signals & Chart Patterns | AUTOZONE INC (NYSE:AZO) - ChartMill
    Summary: AZO Technical Analysis | Trend, Signals & Chart Patterns | AUTOZONE INC (NYSE:AZO) ChartMill

response:
```json
[
  {
    "article_index": 0,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["CHTR"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Spectrum is Charter's subsidiary, so personnel changes in the connectivity products division are company-specific news for the held position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 1,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["CHTR"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Conference participation by Charter Communications is minor company-specific information relevant to the held position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 2,
    "relevant": true,
    "affected_tickers": ["CHTR"],
    "event_type": "company_specific",
    "why_it_matters": "Q1 earnings miss causing share decline and dragging sector peers is significant company-specific news directly impacting the CHTR position."
  },
  {
    "article_index": 3,
    "relevant": false,
    "affected_tickers": [],
    "event_type": "irrelevant",
    "why_it_matters": "Chart/technical analysis pages are explicitly excluded as low-information even when they mention a held ticker."
  }
]
```
